results.rendered_html: accha -cchā ind. Ved. To, towards (with acc.). It is a kind of separable preposition or prefix to verbs and verbal derivatives, especially to such as imply some kind of motion, or speaking; (accha gatyarthavadeṣu  P. I. 4. 69 ); ˚i or gam to go to, attain, as accha gatya; ˚naś-kṣ to go near, approach; ˚nī to lead towards; ˚nu to call out to; ˚pat to fly towards; ˚vaṃd to salute; ˚vac to invite.
